posts.text: I do not know why management account “fair value gain on investments in Apulki Hospitals @ 22 cr” in other income rather than exceptional income. Strange but i felt they wanted to show as some kind of achievement. Thanks!

posts.author: ranvir
posts.community: Krsnaa Diagnostics - what is the diagnosis?
posts.text: Krsnaa Disgnostics - Q4 FY 26 results and concall highlights - Company’s infra - No of CT centers @ 149 No of MRI centers @ 41 Pathology Refernce labs @ 33 ( up from 6 labs in Q4 FY 25 - a massive jump ) Pathology Mother labs @ 114 Patient collection centers @ 4700+ Once their existing order book is completed - MRI+CT scan centers should increase beyond 200 Shall be setting up ( some are already up ) a total of 7 RefLabs + 41 mother labs @ Rajasthan Currently working with state govts of - Rajasthan, Delhi, Punjab, HP, JK, UP,MP, Maharashtra, Karnataka, AP, TN, Jharkhand, Orrisa, Assam, Manipur…

posts.author: murali603
posts.community: Krsnaa Diagnostics - what is the diagnosis?
posts.text: Q4 updates: Rajasthan Pathology services started in Q1, we will see contribution from this in Q1 and fully implemented by Q2. Mangaement guidance only 100-150 Cr from this project in FY27 against the earliest expectation of 250-300 Cr. I feel they are very conservative, we may see good jump in FY28 from this projects. MH Radiology: 10 centers are under implementation phase and implemented in Q1FY27 out of 17 pending centers in this project, balance centers would be implemented in next quarters. There could be some margins hit in Q1 due to initial phase of rajasthan project, over all margins co…
